text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
I dunno! When I ran by the river, I got caught up
in a baseball game and hit a home run!

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text:
So they weren't... Tch. My dice must be on the
highway by now.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
I can't believe they wound up in the back of a
long-haul truck. What'd you have to chuck 'em so
hard for?

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text:
When things get intense, I get carried away, you
know? Anyway, it'd be simple to just fold and
give up, but I'm not one to back out of a game.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
I totally get it! You wanted to play at Koshien,
right?

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text:
...Nah, when we made that bet for our trip, I
wanted to go wherever the dice said.

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text:
Hehe... Still, this game's starting to get good. All I
wanted was to go where the roll of the dice took
us. And it's taking us to wherever that truck's
going.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Then it's settled... We're going... to America. A
pitch like yours was destined for bigger fields
than the nationals, huh?

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text:
I don't care if it's America, France, or wherever.
We go where the dice take us... Yeah.

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text: 'Cause that's what betting on our destiny means.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Woooo! That's why I love ya, Nakayama! Just you
wait, Coach Golshi's gonna find eight more ball
players for our team!
